title: Operate and maintain chainsaws
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate and maintain chainsaws demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assist in preparation of work-site

pcs.text: Identify location of worksite and fallen timber from scope of works and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify location of worksite and fallen timber from scope of works and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify location of worksite and fallen timber from scope of works and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify site hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures.

pcs.text: Document and implement site health and safety in the workplace, environmental and traffic control measures according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and implement site health and safety in the workplace, environmental and traffic control measures according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and implement site health and safety in the workplace, environmental and traffic control measures according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assist in preparation of work-site

elements.title: Recognise and apply workplace safety procedures

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks relevant to the maintenance and operation of chainsaws and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks relevant to the maintenance and operation of chainsaws and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks relevant to the maintenance and operation of chainsaws and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor relevant licensing and legislative requirements with regard to the operation of chainsaws
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor relevant licensing and legislative requirements with regard to the operation of chainsaws?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor relevant licensing and legislative requirements with regard to the operation of chainsaws.

pcs.text: Transport chainsaw safely according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport chainsaw safely according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport chainsaw safely according to operation and maintenance manual.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Recognise and apply workplace safety procedures

elements.title: Check and prepare chainsaw for use

pcs.text: Select tools and materials required for maintenance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and materials required for maintenance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and materials required for maintenance.

pcs.text: Conduct routine checks and maintenance prior to operation, according to chainsaw operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct routine checks and maintenance prior to operation, according to chainsaw operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct routine checks and maintenance prior to operation, according to chainsaw operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Calculate required fuel oil ratios prior to mixing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate required fuel oil ratios prior to mixing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate required fuel oil ratios prior to mixing.

pcs.text: Mix fuel and fuel chainsaw according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mix fuel and fuel chainsaw according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mix fuel and fuel chainsaw according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Identify, tag, record and report chainsaw faults or malfunctions to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, tag, record and report chainsaw faults or malfunctions to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, tag, record and report chainsaw faults or malfunctions to supervisor.

elements.title: Operate chainsaw

pcs.text: Communicate with work team during operations using voice, hand or whistle signals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with work team during operations using voice, hand or whistle signals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with work team during operations using voice, hand or whistle signals.

pcs.text: Place supports to ensure a stable base for cutting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place supports to ensure a stable base for cutting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place supports to ensure a stable base for cutting.

pcs.text: Identify materials to be cut and position them for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify materials to be cut and position them for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify materials to be cut and position them for operation.

pcs.text: Visually assess material to be cut for defects and embedded hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Visually assess material to be cut for defects and embedded hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Visually assess material to be cut for defects and embedded hazards.

pcs.text: Determine cutting methods appropriate to material type and implement risk controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine cutting methods appropriate to material type and implement risk controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine cutting methods appropriate to material type and implement risk controls.

pcs.text: Select and use tools associated with chainsaw use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use tools associated with chainsaw use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use tools associated with chainsaw use.

pcs.text: Operate chainsaw to cross-cut timber using documented low risk work methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate chainsaw to cross-cut timber using documented low risk work methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate chainsaw to cross-cut timber using documented low risk work methods.

pcs.text: Identify and report work-site communication issues to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report work-site communication issues to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report work-site communication issues to supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify and report environmental impacts of chainsaw operation to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report environmental impacts of chainsaw operation to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report environmental impacts of chainsaw operation to supervisor.
